hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq "(^|[[:space:]])kubectl[[:space:]]+(apply|create|delete|patch|scale|edit|replace|label|annotate|rollout|cordon|uncordon|drain|taint|expose|set|autoscale)\b"; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"ask\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"kubectl mutating verb detected. Confirm you intend to change cluster state.\"}}"; fi'
